violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Observed gloving without hand washing.
Reheating food. — --NOTE** Reheat foods to 165F within one hour.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Clean all reach in units on the line - hot and cold units. Clean hot hold units in the prep kitchen. Clean all microwaves.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Clean the shelving in the walk in cooler.
General premises. — --Clean alley way access and grease containers.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Remove cardboard from shelving in cook line, prep kitchen. Cardboard may not be reused. Shelving in storeroom with co2 tanks - repair or replace wood shelving units. Ice cream freezer is rusted on the bottom. Walk in cooler floor/wall/ ceilig are rusted. Repair walk in cooler door.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Clean the slicer; the splash area of the mixer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Clean the following to prevent the build up of debris - Flour debris from baking rack/shelves. Clean exteriors of food bins. Repair condensed of walk in freezer; ice build up around door. Seal plywood dunnage rack. Clean fan guards in walk in cooler.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Vent above the ovens needs to be deep cleaned.
Plumbing system. — --Clean the drain on the prep sink.
Storage areas for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Open plastic bin outside is filled with grease. Dispose.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Deep clean floors throughout bar and kitchen. Walls under the drain board at sink in dish room. Remove ecolab fly trap if not being used.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors, walls and ceilings are in need of repair througout the kitchen. Examples - hole in wall near ice machine; storage room; missing drywall.

General premises. — --Food establishment and all parts of the property in connection with their operation were not kept free from litter. Alley/back area needs to cleaned from debris. Clean around grease containers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
